headline: AbbVie Submits Regulatory Application to FDA for SKYRIZI® (risankizumab-rzaa) Subcutaneous Induction for Adults with Moderately to Severely Active Crohn's Disease
summary: AbbVie (NYSE: ABBV) today announced that it has submitted an application to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) seeking approval for SKYRIZI® (risankizumab-rzaa) for subcutaneous (SC) induction for the treatment of adult patients with moderately to severely active Crohn's disease (CD).

raw.headline: AbbVie Submits Regulatory Application to FDA for SKYRIZI® (risankizumab-rzaa) Subcutaneous Induction for Adults with Moderately to Severely Active Crohn's Disease
raw.summary: AbbVie (NYSE: ABBV) today announced that it has submitted an application to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) seeking approval for SKYRIZI® (risankizumab-rzaa) for subcutaneous (SC) induction for the treatment of adult patients with moderately to severely active Crohn's disease (CD).
